title: Dental Clinic - Excel Dental Care | Jayanagar, Bengaluru
description: Your Ultimate Smile Destiny . Our team - Chief Orthodontist, Cosmetic Dental Surgeon, Specialist Consultant Dentists and Dental Auxiliaries.

Excel Dental Care Your Ultimate Smile Destiny Excel Dental Care is a state of the art dental clinic in Jayanagar, Bangalore; emphasizing on personalized and compassionate practice. We at Excel Dental Care, Bangalore are dedicated to providing Painless dental care in an anxiety-free environment. We at Excel Dental Care, Bangalore have revolutionized the way we practice dentistry by adopting the latest dental technological advancements which significantly helps us perform dental treatments more effectively to achieve precise results, reducing the treatment time and the recovery time, making it a pain-free dental experience. Our team of Dental Professionals include Chief Orthodontist, Cosmetic Dental Surgeon, Specialist Consultant Dentists and Dental Auxiliaries. We take pride in having the best dental team who are highly skilled and experienced and are ‘Committed to Excellence’ . We offer an array of dental treatment procedures using the latest advancements in dentistry. We provide a full range of dental treatment from the traditional metal braces to Specialized Orthodontic treatments like Invisalign, Invisible braces and Aligners, Cosmetic dental procedures like veneers, Lumineers to smile makeovers; Laser dentistry, Restorative dental treatment, Dental Implants, Full mouth rehabilitation procedures, and Oral Surgery. Dr.Jnanesha H C BDS, MDS, FLD CEO, Founder Working Hours Monday : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Tuesday : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Wednesday  : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Thursday : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Friday : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Saturday : 09:00 am-9:00 pm Sunday : 10:00 am-7:00 pm Book an Appointment Staff Dr. Jnanesha H.C Dr. Sindhu S Kumar Specialist Dentists Type of Service Cosmetic dentistry Dental treatment Consultation/Routine dental check-up Invisalign Orthodontic braces-Metal,Ceramic,Invisible Fixing Implants Crowns & Bridges Root Canal Treatment Dental Filling Our Umbrella of Dental Treatments Smile….it raises your face value! ORTHODONTICS & BRACES Braces is a way of straightening teeth, to improve the smile & facial esthetics. ROOT CANAL TREATMENT Is a  procedure to repair and save a tooth that is badly decayed, infected and broken. DENTAL IMPLANT Permanent replacement of missing tooth to restore function and esthetics, lasts a lifetime. DENTAL CROWNS & BRIDGES, DENTURES Most common dental procedure to replace missing tooth/teeth to restore esthetics and function. SMILE DESIGNING/SMILE MAKEOVERS Cosmetic dentistry focuses on crafting beautiful smiles through procedures like  Veneers, Teeth Whitening, Teeth Alignment TEETH WHITENING Effective way of whitening your natural teeth to ‘Shine on’ and for super Lustrous, brighter teeth and dazzling smile PEDIATRIC/CHILDREN'S DENTISTRY We provide preventive, comprehensive, and therapeutic dental services to children, delivered by gentle hands. Kids friendly dental clinic in Bangalore ORAL & MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY From simple extraction to wisdom tooth extractions to diagnosis and treatment of diseases affecting the mouth, jaws, face, and neck. INVISALIGN CLEAR ALTERNATIVE TO BRACES. The most trending Orthodontic treatment modality to straighten your teeth with ‘No restrictions in your Lifestyle’ We promised to take care our patients and we delivered. A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradisematic country Our Distinguished Dental Specialists We have the Best Dentists in Bengaluru Dr.Jnanesha H C BDS, MDS, FLD Orthodontist Dr.Sindhu S Kumar BDS Cosmetic, Dental Surgery We redefine excellence Our team of doctors are committed to ethical and quality, care, motivated towards achieving ‘Excellence in Dentistry’.

Our team travels around India and abroad to attend dental conferences, dental workshops to embrace and adopt new advances in the field of dentistry. Thereby, we keep ourselves updated with the latest advances in the field of dentistry to deliver the best to you.
